Viseu — Portugal

We don't build rooms. We build the wish to return.

Welcome

Every detail, designed to welcome

BeMyGuest was born in Viseu from the wish to turn houses with history into places that feel like home. In the historic centre, every space was crafted for comfort and authenticity — for leisure, work or family stays.

  • Prime historic location. The Sé Catedral, the Jardim das Mães and the old streets — everything a short stroll from your door.

  • Five boutique units. Deluxe, New Age and Muralha — with Alexandre Lobo and Miguel Ponces opening soon.

  • Heated Swimming Spa. A guests-only pool at 30°C, every day of the year.

  • Interiors by BeInside. Wood, linen, stone and Portuguese artisan ceramics, composed with care.

30 °C · all year
Muralha Swimming Spa

Where time slows down

A pool heated to 30°C in the heart of the old town. At dusk, scenic lighting draws reflections on the water — and time slows down.

  • Reserved for guests

    An exclusive relaxation zone, created for deep rest and well-being.

  • Heated to 30°C

    A constant temperature all year round — even in winter.

  • More than a stay

    Accommodation with a wellness area — for those who value slowing down.

Stay & unwind →

The City

Viseu, at your door

A stay only becomes memorable when it connects with the place around it. We work with the people who give this city its soul — and we love pointing you to them.

Ask us anything — itineraries, tables worth booking, the streets locals love.

  • Sé Catedral

    The granite heart of the old town, a short stroll from the house.

  • Museu Grão Vasco

    Renaissance masterworks, right beside the cathedral.

  • Rua Direita

    The city's liveliest street — shops, cafés and centuries of life.

  • Dão wine country

    Portugal's most elegant reds are born minutes from here.
